# Florida Windstorm Insurance

> A free educational resource and licensed insurance referral platform for Florida homeowners seeking windstorm, hurricane, and Citizens Insurance guidance. Operated by a licensed Florida insurance agent serving all 67 Florida counties.

## About
- Licensed Florida Insurance Agent
- Phone: (435) 612-1009
- Location: Fort Lauderdale, FL (serving statewide)
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9am–9pm, Saturday 12pm–5pm

## Key Pages

- /: Homepage — overview of windstorm insurance in Florida, free quote form
- /about: About the site and our licensed insurance credentials
- /windstorm-insurance-florida: Complete guide to windstorm insurance in Florida 2026
- /hurricane-deductible-florida: What is a hurricane deductible and how does it work
- /citizens-insurance-vs-private-market-florida: Citizens Insurance vs private market comparison
- /citizens-insurance-windstorm: Citizens Insurance windstorm coverage explained
- /wind-mitigation-florida: Wind mitigation inspections — what they are and how they save money
- /wind-mitigation-discount-florida: Wind mitigation discounts on Florida insurance premiums
- /coastal-florida-windstorm-insurance: Windstorm insurance for coastal Florida properties
- /cheap-windstorm-insurance-florida: How to find affordable windstorm insurance in Florida
- /windstorm-vs-homeowners-florida: Windstorm insurance vs homeowners insurance — what is the difference
- /fr-44-insurance-florida: FR-44 insurance filing in Florida
- /sr-22-insurance-florida: SR-22 insurance filing in Florida
- /florida-windstorm-insurance-statistics: Florida windstorm insurance statistics and data 2026
- /get-a-quote: Free windstorm insurance quote form

## Topics Covered
Florida windstorm insurance, hurricane deductibles, Citizens Insurance, wind mitigation inspections, coastal property insurance, FR-44 filings, SR-22 filings, Florida homeowners insurance rates 2026
